flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Harcum College fell 48% between 2006 and 2009 (42.7% → 22.4%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Harcum College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.6k → $32.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Harcum College rose 20% between 2006 and 2009 ($15.2k → $18.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Harcum College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (990 → 876).
